message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title DefaultMQProducerImpl 启动流程

actor "DefaultMQProducerImpl" as Producer
participant "Validators" as Validators
participant "MQClientManager" as Manager
participant "MQClientInstance" as Instance
participant "MQClientAPIImpl" as API
participant "PullMessageService" as PullService
participant "RebalanceService" as RebalanceService

note left of Producer: start

activate Producer

Producer -> Validators : checkConfig
Validators -->> Producer : result

Producer -> Manager : getInstance
activate Manager
Manager -> Manager : getAndCreateMQClientInstance
Manager -> Instance : new
deactivate Manager
Manager -->> Producer : mQClientFactory: MQClientInstance

Producer -> Instance : registerProducer
Producer -> Instance : start
activate Instance

Instance -> API : start
Instance -> Instance : startScheduledTask
Instance -> PullService : start
Instance -> RebalanceService : start

Instance --> Producer : start
deactivate Instance

Producer -> Instance : sendHeartbeatToAllBrokerWithLock

deactivate Producer

== start 结束 ==

@enduml
```
